candidate_llm_application_excerpt: model continual-fine-tuning catastrophic forgetting as Heinrich-like episodic events with sub-symbol precursors, self-attenuating feedback, quasi-periodic recurrence; schedule replay checkpoints at predicted pre-event intervals

results.note: Continual pretraining + abrupt loss; close but not periodic-event modeling
Mechanistic analysis with gradient interference + representational drift + loss-landscape flattening — three mechanisms close to candidate's 'sub-symbol embedding instability precedes event'
Spurious forgetting reframes as task-alignment decline, not knowledge loss
